description: Internal Aura MCP toolbelt — all implemented in our own repo. No external MCP server dependencies.

mcps.name: Filesystem
mcps.description: Read/write project and allowed paths. Codebase and vault-safe dirs.
mcps.auth: internal: path allowlist only; no API key.

mcps.name: Git
mcps.description: Git status, diff, log, blame. Repo and deploy flows.
mcps.auth: internal: local repo; no remote secrets in MCP.

mcps.name: Fetch
mcps.description: HTTP fetch for docs, APIs, web. Public URLs only.

mcps.name: Postgres
mcps.description: Sovereign-stack DB. Queries via MCP; creds from vault.
mcps.auth: internal: DB URL from vault; scoped role.

mcps.name: Supabase
mcps.description: App backend when used. Auth via vault.
mcps.auth: internal: service key in vault; never in prompts.

mcps.name: Sentry
mcps.description: Errors and releases. Web and edge observability.

mcps.name: Memory
mcps.description: Persistent key-value memory for agents. Optional; vault-backed.

mcps.name: Puppeteer
mcps.description: Browser automation. E2E or scraping; isolated env only.

mcps.name: Aura
mcps.auth: internal: same process as client; AURA_ROOT env.
